{{CargoOrgan
|name=Biomech Tentacle
|type=Bionic
|rank=purple
|id=10661
|idx=18
|description="Upon termination order, these synthetic appendages become Death's own fingers - snatching targets with machinic cruelty before dragging them into oblivion."
—Skynet Surveillance Log
|skill=Activate Destruction Command, dealing DMG equal to 150.4% of ATK, and control Biomech Tentacle to deal DMG equal to 12.6% of ATK!
|hp=2402
|def=142
|atk=144
|rush=105
|gene1=In Zombie Form, Wind DMG +120
|gene2=In Zombie Form, {race} HP +800
|gene3=In Zombie Form, {race} ATK +80
|gene4=In Zombie Form, Lifesteal +10%
|gene7=In Zombie Form, Lifesteal +10% (Awakened)
|}}
